key_evidence: Carry-forward: April 6 PDX9 worker death; management directive to continue working with body on floor
SDNY criminal investigation into warehouse safety data manipulation ongoing as of May 22 — no new indictments in 24-hour window
Sub-threshold accumulator -3.7 from May 21 carries forward; no new apply-threshold event
Comparative anchor: Microsoft accountability response (GM firing, services termination) sharpens the contrast — EFF previously noted Amazon did NOT take comparable accountability steps for PDX9
